title: Lucena Position
summary: The winning technique in rook endgames

steps.title: Building a Bridge
steps.text: The Lucena Position is the companion to Philidor — the WINNING technique when the stronger side's king has escaped in front of the pawn. The "Bridge" technique uses the rook to shelter the king from checks.

steps.title: The Bridge
steps.text: Method: put your rook on the 4th rank. When the enemy rook checks from the side, your rook interposes — building the "bridge" your king walks across. Paired with Philidor, these two positions cover most rook endgames.
